response.justification: James is an experienced, versatile senior developer with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD) and some high-throughput systems exposure, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis, far from the required 8 years, and his background is predominantly web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. He also lacks demonstrated formal technical-leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at platform scale.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong engineering-practice advocacy: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring via courses and dojos
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (only ~7 months professional C++ work)
Little large-scale cloud compute or distributed-infrastructure platform experience; career centered on product/web development
No formal technical-lead role leading cloud or DevOps engineers on high-impact infrastructure projects
